title: Spaghetti Carbonara
description: A classic Roman pasta dish made with egg, hard cheese, cured pork, and black pepper.
instructions: Cook spaghetti in salted boiling water until al dente.
Fry pancetta in a pan until crispy.
Whisk eggs with grated pecorino and black pepper.
Drain pasta, reserving some cooking water.
Remove pan from heat, add pasta to pancetta, then pour in egg mixture.
Toss quickly, adding pasta water to loosen. Serve immediately.

title: Avocado Toast
description: Simple, nutritious toast topped with creamy avocado and a sprinkle of seasoning.
instructions: Toast the sourdough bread until golden.
Mash the avocado with lemon juice and salt.
Spread avocado mixture onto toast.
Top with chilli flakes and serve.

title: Chicken Tikka Masala
description: Tender chicken in a rich, spiced tomato and cream sauce — a British-Indian classic.
instructions: Marinate chicken in yoghurt, garlic, ginger and spices for 1 hour.
Grill or pan-fry chicken until charred and cooked through.
Fry onions, garlic, and spices in a pan until fragrant.
Add passata and simmer for 15 minutes.
Stir in cream, add chicken, and simmer for 10 more minutes.
Serve with basmati rice or naan.

title: Mushroom Risotto
description: Creamy Italian rice dish packed with earthy mushrooms and parmesan.
instructions: Sauté onion in butter until soft.
Add rice and toast for 2 minutes.
Add white wine and stir until absorbed.
Add stock one ladle at a time, stirring constantly until absorbed.
Fry mushrooms separately and fold in at the end.
Finish with extra butter and parmesan.

title: Greek Salad
description: A refreshing Mediterranean salad with crisp vegetables, olives, and feta.
instructions: Chop cucumber, tomatoes, and red onion into chunks.
Combine vegetables and olives in a large bowl.
Drizzle generously with olive oil and sprinkle with oregano.
Top with crumbled feta cheese and serve.

title: Thai Green Curry
description: A fragrant, coconut-based Thai curry loaded with vegetables and aromatic herbs.
instructions: Fry curry paste in a pan for 1 minute until fragrant.
Pour in coconut milk and bring to a gentle simmer.
Add tofu, courgette, and green beans.
Simmer for 10 minutes until vegetables are tender.
Finish with Thai basil and a squeeze of lime.
Serve over steamed jasmine rice.

title: Beef Stir Fry
description: Quick, high-heat beef and vegetable stir fry with a savory soy glaze.
instructions: Slice beef thinly against the grain.
Heat wok until smoking hot, add a splash of oil.
Sear beef in batches until browned, then set aside.
Stir fry broccoli and pepper with garlic and ginger for 3 minutes.
Return beef to wok, add soy sauce and sesame oil.
Toss everything together and serve immediately.

title: Banana Bread
description: Moist, sweet loaf made with ripe bananas — perfect for using up overripe fruit.
instructions: Preheat oven to 180°C. Grease a 900g loaf tin.
Mash bananas thoroughly in a large bowl.
Cream butter and sugar, then beat in eggs one at a time.
Fold in mashed banana, flour, baking soda, and walnuts.
Pour into prepared tin and bake for 55–60 minutes.
Cool in tin for 10 minutes before turning out.
